channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Prep 107GB of space as Assassin's Creed Shadows preload and expected global release times are shared by Ubisoft
item.description: Ubisoft has announced the global release times for Assassin's Creed Shadows, and you can preload it right now.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Ecco come i leader IT si preparano alla grande sfida per la gestione degli agenti AI
item.description: Via via che gli AI agent arriveranno a occupare porzioni sempre più significative dei flussi di lavoro aziendali, i leader IT dovranno affrontare una sfida sempre più complessa: gestirli.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Utah becomes the first state to pass legislation requiring app stores to verify ages
item.description: Utah has become the first state to pass legislation requiring app stores to verify users’ ages and get parental consent for minors to download apps to their devices.
item.dc:creator: Hannah Schoenbaum, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Nimbi Razor Brand's Unconventional Marketing Strategy
item.description: Nimbi, a London-based razor brand, has found success with an unconventional marketing strategy - using OnlyFans to showcase its products.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Pentagon signs AI deal to aid military decision-making
item.description: The Department of Defense has signed a contract with start-up Scale AI to use artificial intelligence for military planning and operations, marking the Pentagon's latest incorporation of emerging tech into its workflows.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: Judge denies Musk's move against OpenAI
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Google leans further into AI-generated overviews for its search engine
item.description: Google is updating its ubiquitous search engine with the next generation of its artificial intelligence technology as part of an effort to provide instant expertise amid intensifying competition from smaller competitors.
item.dc:creator: Michael Liedtke, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: 1 click cost a father $4 million in bitcoin to vishing scammers
item.description: A man invested $4 million in bitcoin and lost it all with a single click when he was targeted by a vishing scam, which uses phone calls to trick people.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Nvidia confirms that an RTX 5070 Founders Edition is coming... just not on launch day
item.description: The RTX 5070 Founders Edition model isn't available today, and Nvidia hasn't said when you should expect it.
item.dc:creator: alekshamcloughlin@outlook.com (Aleksha McLoughlin), TechRadar

item.title: Judge denies Elon Musk's request to block OpenAI for-profit conversion but welcomes trial
item.description: OAKLAND, Calif. (AP) — A federal judge has denied Elon Musk's request for a court order blocking OpenAI from converting itself to a for-profit company but said she could expedite a trial to consider Musk's claims against the ChatGPT maker and its CEO. U.S.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: UK watchdog drops competition review of Microsoft's OpenAI deal
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Britain's competition watchdog said Wednesday it has dropped its review of Microsoft's partnership with OpenAI, saying it's satisfied that the deal doesn't need a closer investigation under the country's merger rules.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Lawyers in DOGE challenge use Trump remarks before Congress in new filing
item.description: President Trump’s address to Congress on Tuesday night has already made its way into court, with a group of plaintiffs seeking to dismantle the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) quickly latching onto the remarks. "DOGE — perhaps you’ve heard of it. Perhaps," Trump said during his address.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, The Hill

item.title: This new dating app is bringing a Pokémon Go approach to romance
item.description: Ever miss the thrill of the 2016 Pokémon Go craze? A new anti-swiping dating app has come to fill that void, but instead of cute Pokémon you can catch yourself a hot date. These days, trying to find a partner IRL, whether at a bar or reluctantly joining a singles running club, is no easy task.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: AI driving a 165% rise in data center power demand by 2030
item.description: Global power demand from data centers will increase 50% by 2027 and by as much as 165% by the end of the decade compared with 2023, according to a recent report from Goldman Sachs Research The industry is shrugging off the potential of DeepSeek – which claimed large-scale AI modeling capabilities fr
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Jesse Armstrong’s next HBO Original sounds like another Succession-style satire starring Steve Carrell and Jason Schwartzman
item.description: A new HBO movie that’s being touted as the long-awaited follow-up to Succession is releasing on Max very soon.
item.dc:creator: amelia.schwanke@futurenet.com (Amelia Schwanke), TechRadar

item.title: Daredevil: Born Again viewers have two wild fan theories about Foggy Nelson and Muse after the Marvel TV show's debut, but I think there's only one that might be right
item.description: Marvel fans have come up with two big theories after Daredevil: Born Again's two-episode premiere on Disney+.
item.dc:creator: tom.power@futurenet.com (Tom Power), TechRadar

item.title: AI pioneers who channeled 'hedonistic' machines win computer science's top prize
item.description: Teaching machines in the way that animal trainers mold the behavior of dogs or horses has been an important method for developing artificial intelligence and one that was recognized Wednesday with the top computer science award.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Embrace the chaos: A messy Windows productivity system is actually perfect
item.description: I have a confession: My productivity system is a bit of a mess. When I see people sharing beautifully organized Notion dashboards and using the latest subscription-based productivity tools, I often wince.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: The best Java and JVM language frameworks
item.description: Not long ago in this space, we compared the 10 best front-end JavaScript frameworks. Now we turn our piercing gaze to the ample supply of back-end frameworks, starting with frameworks built for Java and JVM languages.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: AirPods dying? Professor discovers microenvironment that may be responsible
item.description: UT-Austin associate professor Yijin Lu said a similar microenvironment exists in all sorts of electronics. This includes places like your phone and electric vehicles.
item.dc:creator: Eric Henrikson, NewsNation

item.title: Authorities use high tech to enhance border security
item.description: Surveillance cameras and drones give border officials an advantage; but the challenge of data-sharing silos remains.
item.dc:creator: Ali Bradley, NewsNation

item.title: Startup Fractile tackles AI inference bottlenecks with new chip design
item.description: A 29-year-old entrepreneur with a Ph.D in robotics is looking to shake up the AI chip industry with an innovative approach that promises to deliver hardware that is 100 times faster, 10 times cheaper, and 20 times more energy efficient than the Nvidia GPUs that dominate the market today.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Democrat questions Rubio over reported State Department Tesla purchase
item.description: Sen. Richard Blumenthal (D-Conn.) pressed the State Department on Monday for answers about the agency’s plans to purchase $400 million worth of armored Teslas after new reporting disputed its initial claims about the contract.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Tariffs for now won’t impact IT organizations
item.description: The impact of tariffs by the Trump Administration on semiconductors from Taiwan is so far not cause for alarm, according to one analyst.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Employee screening data breach exposes 3.3 million records
item.description: Major employee screening company data breach affects 3.3 million people. Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson explains what happened and gives five ways to protect your data.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Casey Anthony, mom acquitted in toddler's death, joins TikTok
item.description: Casey Anthony, a Florida mother who was acquitted of murder charges in the death of her 2-year-old daughter Caylee, has joined TikTok to brand herself as a "legal advocate.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, NewsNation

item.title: Electronic employee monitoring reaches an all-time high
item.description: Monitoring of both remote and in-office employees is at an all-time high, a trend highlighted by federal workers being told to report their weekly accomplishments. A study by the Massachusetts Institute of Technology (MIT) found that 80% of companies are monitoring remote or hybrid workers.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: 5 questions about Trump’s crypto reserve plan
item.description: President Trump offered new details about his plan to create a strategic crypto reserve over the weekend, prompting the cryptocurrency market to rally after a few sluggish weeks.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Why genAI-powered intelligent document processing is a big deal
item.description: One of the earliest digital transformation drivers was digitalization, in which organizations converted paper-based processes to digitized workflows. In ideal circumstances, paper documents became web or mobile forms, and workflows replaced handoffs.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: DeepSeek
item.description: DeepSeek, founded in 2023 by Liang Wenfeng, a Chinese entrepreneur, engineer and former hedge fund manager, is generating a lot of buzz — and for good reason. Here are five things that make it stand out (as well as a listing of the latest news and analysis about DeepSeek).
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: You thought genAI hallucinations were bad? Things just got so much worse
item.description: When science fiction writer Isaac Asimov published his proposed three rules of robotics (back in 1942, amazingly enough), it assumed the hard-wired instructions would be mandatory.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: UK data protection watchdog investigating how TikTok uses children's personal data
item.description: LONDON (AP) — The U.K.'s data protection watchdog said Monday that it's investigating how TikTok uses the personal information of teenagers to deliver content recommendations to them when they use the social media platform.
item.dc:creator: SYLVIA HUI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump announces US crypto reserve
item.description: President Trump announced Sunday that the U.S. would be creating a crypto reserve, to boost the growing industry.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, NewsNation

item.title: Chip Ganassi Racing Partners with OpenAI for Strategic Research Collaboration - AP News
item.description: Chip Ganassi Racing partners with OpenAI for strategic research collaboration, making the two-time reigning IndyCar championship winning team the first to bring in a partner from the artificial intelligence field.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Federal Executive Forum Artificial Intelligence Strategies in Government Progress and Best Practices 2025
item.description: How are agencies refining their AI strategy? The post Federal Executive Forum Artificial Intelligence Strategies in Government Progress and Best Practices 2025 first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: How to restore a deleted text message on iPhone
item.description: Accidentally deleting a text message on your iPhone or iPad is not a problem if you still need the message. Apple has a built-in way to recover it.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Gabbard decries Britain's reported demand for Apple to provide backdoor access to users' cloud data
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard says she has serious concerns about the British government's reported demand that Apple provide backdoor access to any data stored in the cloud.
item.dc:creator: DAVID KLEPPER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: AI & Data Exchange 2025: Salesforce’s Jamison Braun on how AI is reshaping public service
item.description: Agencies are driven by rapid technology changes, upskilling needs and a high bar for CX, Salesforce’s vice president of strategy and business development says. The post AI & Data Exchange 2025: Salesforce’s Jamison Braun on how AI is reshaping public service first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jory Heckman, Federal News Network

item.title: AI & Data Exchange 2025: Guidehouse’s Stuart Brown on AI and digital modernization trends for 2025
item.description: Expect a key trend to be updates to IT architectures so agencies can take advantage of large language models, the Guidehouse digital leader says. The post AI & Data Exchange 2025: Guidehouse’s Stuart Brown on AI and digital modernization trends for 2025 first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network
